question: Buat YAML Ingress yang merutekan traffic dari domain app.example.com ke service my-service port 80

ground_truth.answer:
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: example-ingress
spec:
  rules:
    - host: app.example.com
      http:
        paths:
          - path: /
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: my-service
                port:
                  number: 80
context: io.k8s.api.networking.v1.Ingress: Ingress manages external access to services in a cluster.
io.k8s.api.networking.v1.IngressRule: host and http define routing rules
